---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves
What problem would this feature solve? Ex: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of how you imagine this feature would work.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Benefits
- Benefit 1
- Benefit 2
- Benefit 3

## Examples
If possible, provide examples of how this feature would be used:
```
Code or usage example
```

## Additional Information
Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature here.
